s: Time travelling audio recorder for Android.
d:
Continuously record audio for retrieval at a later time. Unless saved, recordings are deleted on a rolling basis.
  • record harassment and bullying (even when you didn't anticipated them)
  • save important pieces of information (phone numbers / passwords / instructions)
  • record cute/funny moments
  • prove that someone said (or didn't say) something
Limitations The app employs a range of tricks to reduce battery usage but it's still draining quite a bit. You'll have to check your device to see how it affects your battery. Battery drain is comparable to having constant audio playback. Legal notice: Recording laws vary by jurisdiction. You are solely responsible for ensuring your use of this app complies with applicable laws in your area.
